Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a user's saved project, encapsulating all configurations and settings for a specific LED screen setup.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this project.

name.description: The name of the project, chosen by the user.

description.description: A detailed description of the project's purpose or specifics.

config.description: A JSON string containing the full project state.

lastModified.description: Timestamp indicating when the project was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the project was created.

LedScreenConfiguration.title: LedScreenConfiguration
LedScreenConfiguration.description: Defines the specific parameters, inputs, and calculated outputs for an LED screen setup within a project. This entity consolidates data from various calculators (resolution, power, data, weight) and map generators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LedScreenConfiguration entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this configuration belongs to. (Relationship: Project 1:N LedScreenConfiguration, typically 1:1 for the main configuration).

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this configuration.

selectedLedProductId.description: Optional reference to an LedProduct entity used as a template or base for this configuration. (Relationship: LedProduct 1:N LedScreenConfiguration)

displayWidthInMeters.description: The desired total physical width of the LED screen in meters.

displayHeightInMeters.description: The desired total physical height of the LED screen in meters.

pixelPitchInMM.description: The pixel pitch of the LED screen modules in millimeters (distance between pixel centers).

modulesHorizontal.description: The number of LED modules arranged horizontally in the screen setup.

modulesVertical.description: The number of LED modules arranged vertically in the screen setup.

moduleWidthPixels.description: The pixel width of a single LED module, if modules are used in configuration.

moduleHeightPixels.description: The pixel height of a single LED module, if modules are used in configuration.

modulePhysicalWidthInMM.description: The physical width of a single LED module in millimeters, if modules are used in configuration.

modulePhysicalHeightInMM.description: The physical height of a single LED module in millimeters, if modules are used in configuration.

totalPixelsWidth.description: The total calculated pixel width of the entire LED screen.

totalPixelsHeight.description: The total calculated pixel height of the entire LED screen.

totalPhysicalWidthInMeters.description: The total calculated physical width of the entire LED screen in meters.

totalPhysicalHeightInMeters.description: The total calculated physical height of the entire LED screen in meters.

totalScreenWeightInKg.description: The total calculated weight of the LED screen setup in kilograms.

totalPowerConsumptionInWatts.description: The total calculated power consumption of the LED screen setup in watts.

totalCurrentDrawInAmperes.description: The total calculated current draw (amperes) of the LED screen setup.

dataInputRequirements.description: A description or summary of the data input requirements, e.g., '2 sending cards, 8 ports each'.

pixelMapPattern.description: The pattern selected for pixel map generation (e.g., 'checkerboard').

rasterMapConfiguration.description: Serialized configuration details for raster map generation, assisting content designers (e.g., JSON string or specific format).

LedProduct.title: LedProduct
LedProduct.description: Represents a specific model of an LED display module or panel with its physical, pixel, and electrical specifications, typically sourced from a product catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LedProduct entity.

name.description: The marketing name of the LED product (e.g., 'Absen PL2.5 Pro').

description.description: A detailed description of the LED product, including features and benefits.

manufacturer.description: The manufacturer of the LED product.

modelNumber.description: The specific model number or SKU of the LED product.

pixelWidth.description: The pixel width of a single LED module.

pixelHeight.description: The pixel height of a single LED module.

physicalWidthInMM.description: The physical width of a single LED module in millimeters.

physicalHeightInMM.description: The physical height of a single LED module in millimeters.

pixelPitchInMM.description: The pixel pitch of the module in millimeters (distance between pixel centers).

weightPerModuleInKg.description: The weight of a single LED module in kilograms.

powerConsumptionPerModuleInWatts.description: The typical power consumption of a single LED module in watts.

maxRefreshRateHz.description: The maximum refresh rate supported by the LED module in Hertz.

brightnessNits.description: The typical brightness of the LED module in Nits.

dataInputPorts.description: The number of data input ports available on the LED module.

dataOutputPorts.description: The number of data output ports available on the LED module.

Processor.title: Processor
Processor.description: Represents an LED video processor with its technical limits and output capacities.

MediaServer.title: MediaServer
MediaServer.description: Represents a media server hardware profile.

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description: Defines the authorization role for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the project.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent project.

params.name: configId
params.description: The unique ID of the configuration.

definition.description: Global collection for LED product catalog data.

params.name: ledProductId
params.description: The unique ID of the LED product.

definition.description: Global collection for LED processor specifications.

params.name: processorId
params.description: The unique ID of the processor.

definition.description: Global collection for media server hardware profiles.

params.name: serverId
params.description: The unique ID of the media server.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.
